    ShipPlacementController.board
     
    Methods in com.example.battleship.controller with parameters of type Board
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Map<Ship,Ship3D>
    FleetViewBuilder.buildViews(Board board)
     
    private Map<Ship,Ship3D>
    MainGameController.rebuildBoardView(Board board, javafx.scene.Group boardGroup, boolean hideIntactHulls)
    Builds the 3D shape for every ship on an already-placed board and adds it to the scene, then replays every shot already resolved on that board -- a miss becomes an X mark, a hit or sunk cell is applied to the matching ship via Ship3D.markHit(int).
    private void
    MainGameController.replayShotMarks(Board board, Map<Ship,Ship3D> shipViews, javafx.scene.Group boardGroup)

  • Uses of Board in com.example.battleship.model

    Methods in com.example.battleship.model with parameters of type Board
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    FleetPlacer.placeFleetRandomly(Board board, Random random)
    Places one complete fleet (per ShipFactory.createFullFleetTypes()) onto board at random, non-overlapping, in-bounds positions.

    Methods in com.example.battleship.model.player with parameters of type Board
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private void
    HuntShootingStrategy.addIfInBoundsAndShootable(Board board, int row, int column, List<Position> candidates)
    Adds (row, column) to candidates if it's within the board and hasn't been shot at yet; otherwise does nothing.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.allOrthogonalNeighborsOf(Board board, List<Position> cluster)
    Every unshot orthogonal neighbor of every cell in the cluster, combined -- the fallback once both line-ends are exhausted.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.candidatesForCluster(Board board, List<Position> cluster)
    A lone hit means the orientation isn't known yet -- probe all four sides.
    Position
    MachinePlayer.chooseShot(Board opponentBoard)
    Chooses this machine's next shot on the opponent's board, using its ShootingStrategy.
    Position
    HuntShootingStrategy.chooseTarget(Board opponentBoard)
    Chooses the next cell to shoot at on the opponent's board.
    Position
    RandomShootingStrategy.chooseTarget(Board opponentBoard)
    Chooses the next cell to shoot at on the opponent's board.
    Position
    ShootingStrategy.chooseTarget(Board opponentBoard)
    Chooses the next cell to shoot at on the opponent's board.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.collectHitCluster(Board board, Position start, Set<Position> visited)
    Flood-fills every orthogonally-connected hit cell starting from start.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.findHuntCandidates(Board board)
    Finds every connected cluster of hit cells and collects each one's own hunting candidates.
    private boolean
    HuntShootingStrategy.isHit(Board board, Position position)
     
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.lineExtensionCandidates(Board board, List<Position> cluster)
    The two cells just past each end of an already-established line of hits.
    private List<Position>
    HuntShootingStrategy.unshotOrthogonalNeighbors(Board board, Position hit)
